Description:
Represents a section within an outline or table of contents, providing hierarchical structure and navigation capabilities.
Remarks: This class is used to define sections in a document outline, supporting features such as hierarchical levels, scrolling behavior, and active state tracking. Sections can be nested within parent containers, and their properties such as and are used for display and navigation.

Parameters.Name: Title
Parameters.Description: The title of the section in the Table of Contents.

Parameters.Name: Id
Parameters.Description:
The id of the section, used for scrolling. This will be what is appended to the current url, if the section becomes active.
Remarks: (optional) Defaults to the title

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content of the Document Sections

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description: User class names, separated by space.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description: User styles, applied on top of the component's own classes and styles.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description: Use Tag to attach any user data object to the component for your convenience.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description: UserAttributes carries all attributes you add to the component that don't match any of its parameters. They will be splatted onto the underlying HTML tag.

PublicProperties.Name: Level
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the hierarchical level of the current item within its parent container.

PublicProperties.Name: SectionId
PublicProperties.Description: The SectionID used for this section

PublicProperties.Name: Active
PublicProperties.Description: Indicating if the section is currently in the middle of the viewport

Methods.Name: RegisterSectionAsync
Methods.Description: Adds a section to the current Parent (Outline or OutlineSection) and Table of Contents
